title: Decarlos Brown Incompetent to Stand Trial
summary: Decarlos Brown, charged with the murder of Iryna Zarutska, found incompetent to stand trial in federal court.
charlotte_impact: Legal proceedings are stalled, impacting the pursuit of justice for the victim and her family.

title: Cybersecurity Breach Hits Canvas Learning Platform
summary: A cybersecurity breach on the Canvas learning platform exposed student data in multiple NC school districts.

title: Mayor Vi Lyles Announces Resignation
summary: Charlotte Mayor Vi Lyles announces her resignation effective June 30, citing family reasons.

title: Charlotte Faces Unelected Mayor After Lyles' Resignation
